title: Successful account creation with valid mandatory fields
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
No existing account with the same email or username exists in the system
test_steps: Enter a valid password meeting complexity requirements (e.g., 'P@ssw0rd123')
Confirm the password by re-entering the same password
expected_results: First name field accepts input without error
Last name field accepts input without error
Email field accepts input without error
Password field accepts input without error
Confirm password field matches and no mismatch error is shown

Account is created successfully; a success message is displayed (e.g., 'Account created successfully'); user is redirected to the account dashboard or login page; account data is stored in the database

title: Account creation fails when mandatory fields are missing
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Leave the first name field empty
Enter a valid password meeting complexity requirements (e.g., 'P@ssw0rd123')
Confirm the password by re-entering the same password
expected_results: First name field is empty
Last name field accepts input without error
Email field accepts input without error
Password field accepts input without error
Confirm password field matches
Account creation is rejected; an error message is displayed near the first name field indicating it is required; no account is created in the database

title: Account creation fails with invalid email format
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter an invalid email address (e.g., 'johndoeexample.com' missing '@')
Enter a valid password meeting complexity requirements (e.g., 'P@ssw0rd123')
Confirm the password by re-entering the same password
expected_results: First name field accepts input without error
Last name field accepts input without error
Email field accepts input but shows validation error on submission
Password field accepts input without error
Confirm password field matches
Account creation is rejected; an error message is displayed indicating the email format is invalid; no account is created in the database

title: Account creation fails with weak password not meeting complexity requirements
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter a weak password (e.g., 'abc' - too short, no uppercase, no digit, no special character)
Confirm the password by re-entering the same weak password
expected_results: First name field accepts input without error
Last name field accepts input without error
Email field accepts input without error
Password field accepts input but shows validation error on submission
Confirm password field matches

Account creation is rejected; an error message is displayed indicating the password does not meet complexity requirements (e.g., minimum length, required character types); no account is created in the database

title: Account creation fails when email or username already exists
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' is already registered in the system
test_steps: Enter the already registered email address (e.g., 'existing@example.com')
Enter a valid password meeting complexity requirements (e.g., 'P@ssw0rd456')
Confirm the password by re-entering the same password
expected_results: First name field accepts input without error
Last name field accepts input without error
Email field accepts input without error
Password field accepts input without error
Confirm password field matches
Account creation is rejected; an error message is displayed indicating that the email or username already exists; no duplicate account is created in the database

title: Account creation with password at minimum length boundary
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
Minimum password length requirement is known (e.g., 8 characters)
test_steps: Enter a password exactly at the minimum length and meeting all other complexity requirements (e.g., 'Abcd123!' - 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char)
Confirm the password by re-entering the same password
expected_results: First name field accepts input without error
Last name field accepts input without error
Email field accepts input without error
Password field accepts input without error
Confirm password field matches
Account is created successfully; a success message is displayed; account is stored in the database

title: Account creation with password at maximum length boundary
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
Maximum password length requirement is known (e.g., 64 characters)
test_steps: Enter a password exactly at the maximum length and meeting all other complexity requirements (e.g., a 64-character string with valid characters)
Confirm the password by re-entering the same password
expected_results: First name field accepts input without error
Last name field accepts input without error
Email field accepts input without error
Password field accepts input without error
Confirm password field matches
Account is created successfully; a success message is displayed; account is stored in the database

title: Account creation fails with password exceeding maximum length
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
Maximum password length requirement is known (e.g., 64 characters)
test_steps: Enter a password exceeding the maximum length by one character (e.g., a 65-character string)
Confirm the password by re-entering the same password
expected_results: First name field accepts input without error
Last name field accepts input without error
Email field accepts input without error
Password field may truncate or show validation error on submission
Confirm password field matches
Account creation is rejected; an error message is displayed indicating the password exceeds the maximum allowed length; no account is created in the database

title: Account creation fails with password below minimum length
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
Minimum password length requirement is known (e.g., 8 characters)
test_steps: Enter a password shorter than the minimum length by one character (e.g., 7 characters, but meeting other complexity if possible)
Confirm the password by re-entering the same password
expected_results: First name field accepts input without error
Last name field accepts input without error
Email field accepts input without error
Password field accepts input but shows validation error on submission
Confirm password field matches
Account creation is rejected; an error message is displayed indicating the password is too short; no account is created in the database

title: Account creation with identity or contact verification step (if applicable)
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
System requires email verification for account activation
test_steps: Enter all valid mandatory fields (first name, last name, email, password, confirm password)
Check the email inbox associated with the registered email address
Click the verification link in the email
Attempt to log in with the created credentials before verification
Attempt to log in after verification
expected_results: All fields accept valid input without error
Account is created but marked as 'pending verification'; a success message is displayed indicating that a verification email has been sent
Post-registration screen shows a message to check email for verification
A verification email is received at the registered email address within a reasonable time
Clicking the verification link redirects to a confirmation page; account status changes to 'active'
Login attempt before verification fails with an error message indicating account is not yet verified
Login attempt after verification succeeds; user is redirected to the account dashboard
